evals.prompt: Add a new notifications page at /app/notifications that shows a list of notifications for the current company
evals.expected_output: Creates page component in src/pages/, TanStack Query hook in src/hooks/, adds route to App.tsx with ProtectedRoute, uses Shadcn UI components, includes company_id filter

assertions.name: page-created
assertions.description: A new page component is created in src/pages/

assertions.name: hook-created
assertions.description: A TanStack Query hook is created in src/hooks/ with useQuery pattern

assertions.name: route-added
assertions.description: Route is added to src/App.tsx under /app/* with ProtectedRoute wrapper

assertions.name: company-id-filter
assertions.description: Supabase query includes .eq('company_id', companyId) for RLS

assertions.name: shadcn-components
assertions.description: Uses Shadcn UI components (Card, Table, etc.) not custom primitives

assertions.name: vite-env
assertions.description: No process.env usage — only import.meta.env if env vars are needed

evals.prompt: Create a team members management feature where admins can view and invite users to their company
evals.expected_output: Creates components in src/components/team/, hook with company_id filter, proper multi-tenancy, uses existing auth patterns

assertions.name: component-directory
assertions.description: Components are placed in src/components/<feature-name>/ following convention

assertions.name: query-enabled-guard
assertions.description: TanStack Query hook has enabled: !!companyId guard

assertions.name: no-server-imports
assertions.description: No ioredis, child_process, fs, or path imports in src/ files

evals.prompt: Scaffold a simple settings toggle for enabling/disabling email digests
evals.expected_output: Small feature: adds to existing settings page or creates minimal new component, uses existing patterns

assertions.name: reads-existing-patterns
assertions.description: Reads existing settings components before creating new ones

assertions.name: type-check-passes
assertions.description: Runs npx tsc --noEmit as final verification step

assertions.name: minimal-scaffolding
assertions.description: Does not over-scaffold — simple toggle doesn't need a full page + hook + route
